Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 157 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I know it sounds boring, but that's what I really want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 157 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}That's what I wished for as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 157 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}We all wished for the same thing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 157 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}However, I'm not praying for divine help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 157 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}There's nothing to worry about. I have the utmost certainty that we can do this.[n]{f 1 1}
